sections.name: Fried chicken
items: Signature Spicy Fried Chicken Sandwich - crispy fried chicken sandwich with coleslaw, pickles, and American cheese
Bacon Jam Spicy Fried Chicken Sandwich - crispy spicy fried chicken sandwich with bacon jam, garlic aioli, and American cheese on brioche
Buffalo Blue Spicy Fried Chicken Sandwich - crispy spicy fried chicken tossed in house buffalo sauce with lettuce, tomato, and blue cheese on brioche
Fried Chicken Pieces - 2 spicy crispy fried chicken thighs with a buttermilk biscuit, coleslaw, and a dipping sauce

sections.name: Burgers
items: Classic Burger - double patty, American cheese, red onion, Dijonnaise, and pickles on brioche
Bleu Burger - double patty, blue cheese, caramelized red onions, sauteed mushrooms, and house ketchup on brioche
BLT Burger - double patty, American cheese, triple bacon, lettuce, tomato, and garlic aioli on brioche
Juicy Lucy - double patty with melted cheese sandwiched between and Lucy's secret sauce on brioche
Impossible Burger patty substitute available

sections.name: Fries and sides
items: Hand Cut Golden Fries
Cheese Fries - cheddar cheese sauce with optional jalapenos
Porky Fries - smoked pork shoulder, bacon, BBQ, queso cotija, and pickled jalapenos
Fried Pickles - dill pickle spears fried and served with Lucy's secret sauce
House Salad - basket of salad tossed in lemon garlic vinaigrette
Mac & Cheese - elbow noodles smothered in cheese

sections.name: Dipping sauces and sweets
items: Dipping sauces: buttermilk ranch, honey mustard, house BBQ, dill pickle ranch, honey butter, and Lucy's secret sauce
Milkshake - chocolate, strawberry, or vanilla, with malt option
Soft serve ice cream
Vintage bottled soda
Can soda

notes: Stored from the user's pasted location page and menu so future rescans can reuse the source without refetching the site.
The pasted menu appears to be shared across both the Humboldt Park and Uptown locations.
The menu text does not publish an allergen guide or a fryer and cross-contact protocol.
